CONTRACT_SELECTED.smallest_safe_next_action: Create a grouped exact missing-data cost-check task only for setup-time selected-option fields.

ENTRY_ELIGIBLE.smallest_safe_next_action: Preserve frozen quote-age rejection controls in regression.

NONE.smallest_safe_next_action: Use as positive-entry expansion reference; do not claim proof.

SETUP_QUALIFIED.smallest_safe_next_action: Add grouped local fixture evidence before any data request.

TRADE_CANDIDATE.smallest_safe_next_action: Add grouped local fixture evidence before any data request.

owner_questions.did_it_classify_the_setup_as_a_possible_: Yes for accepted-entry-stage lifecycle rows and the three CFB selected-contract replay rows; accepted-entry stage is not the same as an executed trade.
owner_questions.did_safe_fast_recognize_the_setup_before: Yes for the grouped lifecycle candidates that reached setup or trade-candidate stages; recognition is still incomplete for shape-only/missing-data rows.
owner_questions.was_a_tradable_option_available_at_that_: Only SPY Clean Fast Break 002 currently has local selected-contract entry and exit evidence sufficient for a review-only captured valid entry. Day 49 setup-time evidence also proved SPY Ideal 001 and SPY Continuation 001 had selected same-contract setup-window quotes and trade volume, but both failed the frozen quote-age gate. Other candidate families are blocked by stale quote, future quote, wide spread, or missing setup-time selected-option evidence.
owner_questions.was_rejection_caused_by_real_safety_rule: Both: 4 true no-trade controls are frozen safety-rule failures, while 6 cases are missing-data blockers and unresolved rows remain separate.
